title: cyperus semiochraceus
intro: Cyperus semiochraceus, also known as the lesser umbrella sedge or umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cyperus semiochraceus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Cyperus semiochraceus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine practices in various parts of the world.
